TypeSignature.Value: .class public interface auto ansi abstract beforefieldinit IValidationAttributeFormatter

Docs.summary: Formats a validation error message template with attribute-specific arguments. Used by the validation localization pipeline to produce fully formatted error messages from localized templates that contain positional placeholders beyond {0} (the display name).

remarks.para: To add formatting support for a custom validation attribute, you have two options:

item.description: Implement directly on the attribute itself. checks for this first and uses the attribute as its own formatter automatically.
Create a separate implementation and register it via by calling .

MemberSignature.Value: public string FormatErrorMessage (System.Globalization.CultureInfo culture, string messageTemplate, string displayName);
.method public hidebysig newslot virtual instance string FormatErrorMessage(class System.Globalization.CultureInfo culture, string messageTemplate, string displayName) cil managed
Public Function FormatErrorMessage (culture As CultureInfo, messageTemplate As String, displayName As String) As String
abstract member FormatErrorMessage : System.Globalization.CultureInfo * string * string -> string
public: System::String ^ FormatErrorMessage(System::Globalization::CultureInfo ^ culture, System::String ^ messageTemplate, System::String ^ displayName);

Docs.param: The error message template containing format placeholders.
The resolved display name of the member being validated.
Docs.summary: Formats the specified by substituting attribute-specific arguments alongside the .
